$ORIGIN lasujms.com.
$TTL 14400

@   IN  A       67.215.249.224
www IN  CNAME   lasujms.com.
ftp IN  CNAME   lasujms.com.
mail IN A       67.215.249.224
webmail IN A    67.215.249.224

@   IN  MX 0    mail.lasujms.com.

@   IN  TXT "v=spf1 a mx ip4:67.215.249.224 -all"

_dmarc  IN  TXT "v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; pct=100"

_submission._tcp IN SRV 0 0 587 mail.lasujms.com.
_imap._tcp       IN SRV 0 0 143 mail.lasujms.com.
_imaps._tcp      IN SRV 0 0 993 mail.lasujms.com.
_pop3._tcp       IN SRV 0 0 110 mail.lasujms.com.
_pop3s._tcp      IN SRV 0 0 995 mail.lasujms.com.

_domainkey IN TXT "t=y; o=~;"

mail._domainkey IN TXT "v=DKIM1; k=rsa; "

@   IN  CAA 0 issue "letsencrypt.org"
